events.label: assistant
events.text:
Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`.

Key call: the photos/briefing only show perimeter-level controls (guards, access control, crew protection) and a signed form — none of that is evidence of the actual LOTO mechanics that 1910.147 requires: locks/tags on specific energy-isolating devices, individual or group lock accountability, and a documented zero-energy verification. Since those core elements aren't visible one way or the other, I marked it `needs_more_info` (medium risk) rather than a clean pass, with actions focused on obtaining evidence of the physical lockout and verification before authorizing entry into the exposure area.
